name: Email Assistant
description: AI-powered email writing, review, and compliance checking. Generate templates, optimize subject lines, audit for spam triggers, and check CAN-SPAM/GDPR/CASL compliance. Powered by evolink.ai
author: EvoLinkAI

dataTransmission.api.evolink.ai: AI commands (generate, review, subject, compliance, translate) send email content to api.evolink.ai for analysis by Claude. No data is stored after the response is returned. Local commands (templates, dns) run entirely locally and never transmit data.
